title: cajanus marmoratus
intro: Cajanus marmoratus, also known as Pigeonwings or Pigeon pea, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cajanus marmoratus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and help manage diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a paste or powder, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin for its therapeutic benefits.
